attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUS_TRX_LIN_EXTN)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.UNIQUE_ID                     
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.UNIT_LIST_PRICE               
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.OA_FLAG                       
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.ISV_NAME                      
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.TRUEUP_COMMITMENT_AMOUNT      
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.TRUEUP_USAGE_AMOUNT_FOR_PERIOD
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_ID         
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.REQUEST_ID                    
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CREATED_BY                    
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CREATION_DATE                 
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.TRAIL_FILE_NAME               
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE               
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.REFRESH_DATETIME              
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.TRIAL_CREDIT_FLAG             
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.SUBSCRIPTION_NUMBER           
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.RATIO                         
,STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID  
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN,
 (
 select  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN
 minus
 select  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN.REFRESH_DATETIME
